title: If you’ve actually built a profitable EA, read this.
author: Ok-Carpenter-9245
selftext:
Most “algo devs” on here optimize garbage and call it edge.

We run Cypher — a live FX algo company with real users, real capital, and real risk. Our flagship system (Delorean) trades 10 pairs live.

We’re not looking for coders.

We’re looking for someone who has already built a profitable MT4/MT5 system and knows why it works.

You should understand:

	•	Risk of ruin, fat tails, regime shifts

	•	Correlation clustering + portfolio heat

	•	Position sizing beyond martingale/grid nonsense

	•	How to build edge without curve-fitting

We already have devs. We already have systems.

We want someone who can build the next evolution.

If your work is legit, comp won’t be an issue. Cash + potential equity.

Send:

	•	Track record or serious backtests

	•	Short explanation of your edge

	•	Why most retail EAs fail

If you’ve ever said “retail algos are trash” — prove you’re not retail.

DMs open.

comments.author: stereotomyalan
comments.body: Are you going to ask for tghe MQ5 source?

replies.author: Ok-Carpenter-9245
replies.body:
No.

But if we progressed far enough and found alignment and made a deal then yes. 

Lots of conversations to be had before that.

replies.author: More-Intention-8489
replies.body: I would love to chat with you - DM me pls. I could not.

comments.author: Spirited_Syllabub488
comments.body:
is there a website I could look for.....

I have my own profitable ML model (6 years tested, 6 month live trading....... just don't have users to scale.

comments.author: GallegoTrading
comments.body: Tengo dos robots que funcionan perfectamente con cuenta auditada de varios años, ahora os envío DM

comments.author: ArtistSuch2170
comments.body: Started trading 16 years ago. In the past 20mo I've built dozens of Mt5 EAs most with structure based sig gen that doesn't need to be optimized every few months using timeless events. Made 15k in our live accounts YTD. Def interested in hearing more about your offer.

replies.author: Ok-Carpenter-9245
replies.body: Shoot me a DM and let’s chat more
